details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing (required by governance contract). memory_bank/ has docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README + specs, reports/audit/ exists.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active code (board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot. These are code/config files, not audit/docs documenting removal.
